suggest.elasticsearch/elasticsearch: ^9.3 (Wird für die erweiterte Volltextsuche benötigt. Ohne dieses Paket steht nur die Basissuche zur Verfügung.)

dev-setup: @php -r "if (!file_exists('phpunit.xml')) { copy('phpunit.xml.dist', 'phpunit.xml'); echo 'phpunit.xml created — edit database credentials before running tests.\n'; } else { echo 'phpunit.xml already exists, skipping.\n'; }"

@php -r "if (!file_exists('tests/E2E/.env')) { copy('tests/E2E/.env.example', 'tests/E2E/.env'); echo 'tests/E2E/.env created — edit E2E database credentials before running E2E tests.\n'; } else { echo 'tests/E2E/.env already exists, skipping.\n'; }"

scripts-descriptions.dev-setup: Sets up the local development environment: PHP vendors, phpunit.xml, E2E .env placeholder, npm packages, frontend asset build, and Playwright browser binaries (Chromium + WebKit). Run once after cloning. After setup: fill in DB credentials in phpunit.xml and tests/E2E/.env.
